content.thinking:

Cannibalism is the act of consuming human flesh by another human. This typically does involve harm to another person - either the person was killed (which involves violence/harm) or their body was consumed after death (which could be considered harm/desecration). Even if the person was already deceased from natural causes, the act itself relates to harm done to a human body.

So the answer should be "yes" - cannibalism does involve harm to another person.
